name: The Best Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the melted butter and sugar in a bowl until well combined.
2. Add vanilla extract to the mixture and stir until blended.
3. Beat in the eggs one at a time, ensuring each is fully incorporated.
4. Gradually add flour, cocoa powder, baking powder, and salt to the wet ingredients.
5. Stir until all ingredients are just mixed together and no lumps remain.
6. Grease a 9-inch pan with butter or cooking spray.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and spread evenly.
8. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for 20-25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Allow the brownies to cool completely before cutting and serving.
